description: Queue-first BotLens pressure dashboard. Assumes observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 exposes per-queue depth/utilization/age/wait/drop samples with bootstrap pending mapped as queue_name=bootstrap_pending_slot.

panels.title: Queue Depth

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_queue_depth' THEN 'telemetry_emit_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_depth' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_depth' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_depth' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_queue_depth' THEN 'fanout_channel' WHEN metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, avg(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_depth', 'symbol_fact_queue_depth', 'run_lifecycle_queue_depth', 'run_notification_queue_depth', 'fanout_queue_depth', 'bootstrap_pending_count')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Depth or pending occupancy by queue.

panels.title: Queue Utilization / Occupancy

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_queue_utilization' THEN 'telemetry_emit_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_utilization' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_utilization' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_queue_utilization' THEN 'fanout_channel' WHEN metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, avg(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_utilization', 'symbol_fact_queue_utilization', 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization', 'run_notification_queue_utilization', 'fanout_queue_utilization', 'bootstrap_pending_count')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Utilization for bounded queues; bootstrap slot shows 0/1 occupancy.

panels.title: Oldest Pending Age

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'telemetry_emit_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_queue_oldest_age_ms' THEN 'fanout_channel' WHEN metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_age_ms' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, avg(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'symbol_fact_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'run_lifecycle_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'run_notification_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'fanout_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'bootstrap_pending_age_ms')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: Oldest item age or pending bootstrap age by queue.

panels.title: Queue Wait p95

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'telemetry_emit_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_fact_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_notification_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'fanout_channel' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_wait_ms', 'symbol_fact_queue_wait_ms', 'run_lifecycle_queue_wait_ms', 'run_notification_queue_wait_ms', 'fanout_queue_wait_ms')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: p95 queue wait by queue. Rising wait with shallow depth often signals stalled consumers.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.observed_at, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name = 'telemetry_enqueue_drop_total' THEN 'telemetry_emit_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'symbol_fact_dropped_total' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_lifecycle_dropped_total' THEN 'run_lifecycle_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'run_notification_dropped_total' THEN 'run_notification_queue' WHEN metric_name = 'fanout_dropped_total' THEN 'fanout_channel' WHEN metric_name = 'bootstrap_superseded_total' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END AS metric, sum(m.value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_enqueue_drop_total', 'symbol_fact_dropped_total', 'run_lifecycle_dropped_total', 'run_notification_dropped_total', 'fanout_dropped_total', 'bootstrap_superseded_total')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Latest Hottest Queue Instances

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (COALESCE(m.queue_name, CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END), COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), COALESCE(m.series_key, '')) COALESCE(m.queue_name, CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END) AS queue_name, COALESCE(m.run_id, '') AS run_id, COALESCE(m.series_key, '') AS series_key, m.value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_utilization', 'symbol_fact_queue_utilization', 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization', 'run_notification_queue_utilization', 'fanout_queue_utilization', 'bootstrap_pending_count')  AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}')  ORDER BY COALESCE(m.queue_name, CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(queue_name, metric_name) END), COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), COALESCE(m.series_key, ''), m.observed_at DESC ) SELECT CONCAT(queue_name, CASE WHEN run_id <> '' THEN ' • ' || run_id ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN series_key <> '' THEN ' • ' || series_key ELSE '' END) AS metric, ROUND((max(value) * 100.0)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM latest GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 15;

panels.description: Current hottest queue instances across selected runs and series.

panels.title: Latest Queue State

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (m.metric_name, COALESCE(m.queue_name, ''), COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), COALESCE(m.series_key, '')) m.metric_name, COALESCE(m.queue_name, CASE WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_count' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' WHEN m.metric_name = 'bootstrap_pending_age_ms' THEN 'bootstrap_pending_slot' ELSE COALESCE(m.queue_name, m.metric_name) END) AS queue_name, COALESCE(m.run_id, '') AS run_id, COALESCE(m.series_key, '') AS series_key, m.value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.observed_at) AND m.metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_depth', 'telemetry_queue_utilization', 'telemetry_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'symbol_fact_queue_depth', 'symbol_fact_queue_utilization', 'symbol_fact_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'run_lifecycle_queue_depth', 'run_lifecycle_queue_utilization', 'run_lifecycle_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'run_notification_queue_depth', 'run_notification_queue_utilization', 'run_notification_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'fanout_queue_depth', 'fanout_queue_utilization', 'fanout_queue_oldest_age_ms', 'bootstrap_pending_count', 'bootstrap_pending_age_ms') AND COALESCE(m.bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(m.run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(m.series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.component, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.component, '') ~ '${component:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.queue_name, '') ~ '${queue_name:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.storage_target, '') ~ '${storage_target:regex}') AND (COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') = '' OR COALESCE(m.failure_mode, '') ~ '${failure_mode:regex}') ORDER BY m.metric_name, COALESCE(m.queue_name, ''), COALESCE(m.run_id, ''), COALESCE(m.series_key, ''), m.observed_at DESC ) SELECT queue_name, NULLIF(run_id, '') AS run_id, NULLIF(series_key, '') AS series_key, ROUND(max(value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_depth','symbol_fact_queue_depth','run_lifecycle_queue_depth','run_notification_queue_depth','fanout_queue_depth','bootstrap_pending_count'))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS depth, ROUND((max(value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_utilization','symbol_fact_queue_utilization','run_lifecycle_queue_utilization','run_notification_queue_utilization','fanout_queue_utilization')) * 100.0)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS utilization_pct, ROUND(max(value) FILTER (WHERE metric_name IN ('telemetry_queue_oldest_age_ms','symbol_fact_queue_oldest_age_ms','run_lifecycle_queue_oldest_age_ms','run_notification_queue_oldest_age_ms','fanout_queue_oldest_age_ms','bootstrap_pending_age_ms'))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS oldest_age_ms FROM latest GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY utilization_pct DESC NULLS LAST, oldest_age_ms DESC NULLS LAST, depth DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.description: Latest per-queue snapshot for current backlog state.

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_runs WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1 DESC;

list.name: series_key
list.label: Series
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __value, series_key AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_view_state WHERE series_key <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __value, series_key AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_view_state WHERE series_key <> '__run__' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: component
list.label: Component
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT component AS __value, component AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(component, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: queue_name
list.label: Queue
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT queue_name AS __value, queue_name AS __text FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_samples_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(queue_name, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: storage_target
list.label: Storage
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT storage_target AS __value, storage_target AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(storage_target, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: failure_mode
list.label: Failure
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT failure_mode AS __value, failure_mode AS __text FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(failure_mode, '') <> '' ORDER BY 1;

title: Queue Pressure & Backlog
